content.en:
Soon.

Aoi arrived at the Golden God and immediately went to meet the Golden Exterminator Ancient Demon of the Golden God Department.

"I've seen the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon!"

Aoi said respectfully.

"Aoi, you talk to Wei and he tells you about the strength of the sky, and you must kill him!" said the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon.

Wei walked out and then communicated with Aoi.

"What kind of strength is that day?"

Aoi was a little curious, he knew that Wei was defeated by the sky, although he didn't look down on the strength of the Wei, but it was definitely not easy to defeat the sky.

Wei introduced: "That Tian has only just broken through to the strength of the emperor level, and he comes from a medium tribe, he doesn't have a big background, but he is very demonic, he has comprehended the power of the rudimentary form of the ultimate rule realm, and he has created three top ultimate arcane arts, and it is also a self-created ultimate way, and the self-created ultimate way is extremely high, stronger than many ancient demon-level ultimate ways!"

"Comprehended the prototype of the Ultimate Rules Realm, and also created three top-notch Ultimate Arcane !!!!"

Aoi was a little surprised.

He didn't do it!

"Will he be able to burst the secret method of combat power?" Aoi asked.

"The other party probably won't, anyway, I haven't seen him do it!" Wei said.

"As long as it doesn't improve the secret method of combat effectiveness, I can kill him with confidence!"

Aoi said confidently.

......

The Abyss of Green Raccoon.

Soon, Wei arrived here with Aoi, and then entered the headquarters of the Golden God Department here.

As soon as they came in, a group of emperors said respectfully: "I've seen Brother Kui!"

"You lock the position of the sky, and I will deal with him!"

Aoi said.

At this time, an emperor-level said: "The sky is not in the abyss of Qinghuan at the moment. "

"No, then force him out. "

Aoi said.

He didn't want to waste time here, after all, after he killed Ye Tian, there were other things to do, and he had to continue to enter that battlefield.

"I'm going to kill some emperors, and after the dragon tribe knows about it, they will definitely notify the heavens to come over~. "

Immediately, Wei went out, and then began to search for the emperor level of the dragon disciple tribe.

Soon.

He found an emperor, hit him hard with one move, and then began to torture this emperor, and did not stop the other party from asking for help.

......

On the Dragons' side.

Ye Tian received a summons and learned that Wei was killing an emperor-level existence, and asked him to go over to support.

"How dare Wei come out?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

This guy should be avoiding him, isn't he afraid of being killed by him, or does the other party have a hole card to escape and not be afraid of falling?

No matter what the other party's confidence is, he must go.

Swish!

Ye Tian used the Dapeng Technique, quickly arrived at the Qinghuan Abyss, and escaped into it.

And not long after Ye Tian entered the Qinghuan Abyss, he was locked by the Golden God Department.

This feeling of lock-in, it was not the first time for him, so he knew it as soon as possible.

He didn't move, but waited quietly for the arrival of the rays.

He wanted to know why Wei dared to confront him.

However, what he ushered in was not Wei, but another emperor-level existence.

Wow!

An emperor-level with a soft breath appeared in front of Ye Tian, staring at Ye Tian, it was a look of contempt, as if he didn't put Ye Tian in his eyes.

"Aoi?"

Ye Tian knew the other party's name through copying talent, and this was definitely not the emperor level of the Golden God Department.

Because he investigated the emperor level of the Golden God Department not long ago, there was no such one.

Wei is already the most powerful emperor-level in the Golden God Clan, and this Aoi doesn't know where it came from.

"Wei's confidence turned out to be this one!"

Ye Tian understood, the Golden God Department asked for help, and transferred an even more terrifying emperor level from other tribes that were no less than the Golden God Department or even more powerful than the Golden God Department.

Swish!!

Both sides immediately got into action.

Bang!!!

The two fought for the first time, and Ye Tian's Arrow Mother Blade touched the opponent's attack, but it was just equal to each other.

However, he knew very well that there must be other forms of this emperor-level, otherwise this kind of combat power alone would be more powerful than Wei Wei's usual state, and he would not dare to challenge himself.

Really.

Aoi casts her own special form.

"Multiple Water Demon Forms!"

Aoi has become a two-horned and large body, and his particles have grown larger, which is completely different from the multi-particle form of the ray.

Seeing this, Ye Tian immediately unleashed the power of the Ultimate Rule Domain Prototype, since he had only comprehended the Ultimate Gujian Fragment for a short time, the power of the Ultimate Rule Domain Prototype was only a little stronger than the last time, but it was not strong enough to make the strength skyrocket.

Thundered!!!!

The two sides kept fighting, and he had to admit that Aoi's multiple water demon states were even more powerful, far surpassing Wei.

Aoi may have cultivated this form to the peak realm of the first form, and his combat power is naturally very exaggerated.

Moreover, even if Ye Tian's attack injured Aoi, the other party could recover quickly, indicating that this form had a super healing effect.

"'~ Aoi's form is too powerful!'"

Ye Tian frowned.

In his time, there was no such secret method, and if there were, it was impossible not to have passed it on.

But now, he really saw the horror of this era.

No wonder those ultimate ancient demons and the sleeping bodies of the peak ancient demons, they didn't even dare to get close to the Doomsday Extreme Venerable, the gap was really too big!

It's a pity that even in such a powerful era, it is still annihilated.

After a few more killings, Aoi stopped.

"You are really strong, if you are in this form, you can't hold a few moves at all, but you can only be weaker than the downside. Looks like I'm going to have to deal with you in my strongest form!"

After saying that, Aoi's aura changed.

"Multiple Water Demon Forms - Second Form * Split!"

However, in Ye Tian's eyes, Aoi's aura seemed to be weaker in addition to becoming ethereal.

Perhaps, this is a delusion!

Immediately, he unleashed the Blade of the Ultimate Arcane Arromu and attacked Aoi again.

Burst!

Aoi's defense seemed to have weakened all of a sudden, and he was cut in half with a single sword.

But then, a shocking scene happened.

Aoi, which had become two halves, squirmed and turned into two Aoi.

Ye Tian continued to attack, and Aoi, who was cut in two again, differentiated into another Aoi.

Moreover, each Aoi's attack power is also very powerful.

kept killing, but the number of Aoi became more and more, and under the joint attack, Ye Tian began to be unable to hold on.

"The more you kill him, the more there will be, if you don't attack, you will have to be attacked, the second form of this secret method is too terrifying!"

Ye Tian frowned.

Immediately, he informed the Dragon Disciple tribe and asked the other emperors to quickly withdraw from the Qinghuan Abyss, otherwise the other emperors would definitely die.

And he has to find a way to escape.,Can this replica body not fall.,Or don't fall.,Otherwise, the secret that his replica body is a clone won't be kept.。。
